name: Your own tribe
description:
This a rather simple bot, and my first, so... The quality may, or may not be dissapointing considering my lack of knowledge related to AI - But anyway, the point of this Is simple, your own tribe. You can make It be build around any race, fantasy or not, It's all up to you.

(You may encounter a few Issues here and there, but I had them go away pretty easily with either editing or rerolling the reply. I honestly just wanted to make this since I have a ton of persona's who don't really work In a lot of scenarios due their race.)

(One last note, do tell If there's any Issues that you encountered, and If this Is somehow any good, bot suggestion are welcome as well. I ain't good at this, but I'll gladly try to make whatever Is suggested)
creator: Goosychef
